title: Stone Crafting
description: A mod that adds Andesite, Diorite and Granite to crafting recipes.
body:
Many a mod was made to add more stone to make tools with, this is one of these mods, this one is just lighter.

This Mod adds Andesite, Diorite and Granite to the crafting system so that you don't have to just carry around all that decorative stone.

This Mod allows you to use these stones to craft Tools / Weapons, Functional Blocks and a few others.

This is mostly just a datapack that is compatible with forge, but at least you don't have to keep adding it to your worlds.
